description: Audit serializer sorts keys for HMAC signature stability; sibling serializers do not.

findings.rationale: serializeAudit is structurally near-identical to serializeUser and serializeProduct (same field-pick pattern, same null-coalescing, same conditional branch, same JSON.stringify return) but inserts a deterministic key-sort before stringification. The sort is load-bearing: removing it changes the byte sequence the audit-signer service HMACs, invalidating signatures on every existing audit record. An agent told to deduplicate these three serializers will normalize the audit version onto the unsorted helper unless warned.
